methods.description: This method involves predicting protein intrinsically disordered regions, secondary structure, signal sequences, and O-glycosylation patterns using various bioinformatics tools.

steps.description: The VSL2B predictor (part of DisProt database of protein disorder) was used to detect protein intrinsically disordered regions.
steps.searchable_summary: use VSL2B predictor to detect protein disordered regions

steps.description: Secondary protein structure was predicted using Phyre2 with default settings using the intensive modeling mode.
steps.searchable_summary: predict secondary protein structure using Phyre2

steps.description: Signal sequence prediction was performed using the SignalP 4.1 Server with the default settings.
O-glycosylation patterns were detected using ScanProsite with the amino acid motif [ASTV]-P(1,4)-X(0,10)-[ASTV]-P(1,4) with greedy and no overlap options.

methods.description: This method involves sequence alignment, editing, annotation, and manipulation using various software tools.

steps.description: Sequence alignment, editing, annotation and manipulation were done using Geneious 8.1.3 software, BioEdit v7.2.5 and MEGA7.0 software.
steps.searchable_summary: align and edit sequences using Geneious, BioEdit, and MEGA

steps.description: Sequencing files were edited and quality checked using 4Peaks software.
steps.searchable_summary: edit and quality check sequences using 4Peaks

methods.description: This method calculates INDEL diversity and performs evolutionary analysis using various bioinformatics tools.

steps.description: INDEL diversity and average INDEL length was calculated by DnaSP 5.10 software.
Evolutionary analysis was performed using MEGA 7.0 software and MUSCLE algorithm with default settings and minor manual adjustments.
steps.searchable_summary: perform evolutionary analysis using MEGA and MUSCLE

steps.description: The evolutionary history was inferred using the Neighbor-Joining method and the bootstrap test was performed for each tree (500 replicates).
steps.searchable_summary: infer evolutionary history using Neighbor-Joining and bootstrap test

steps.description: The evolutionary distances were computed using the Tamura-Nei method and are in the units of the number of base substitutions per site.
steps.searchable_summary: compute evolutionary distances using Tamura-Nei method

steps.description: To calculate the dN/dS ratio for PELPIII, TTS and 120 K genes Nei-Gojobori method was used.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate dN/dS ratio using Nei-Gojobori method
